decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: reviewed_by='Legal', reviewed_at='2026-03-17T17:00:00-07:00', ip_rights_status='clear', compliance_flags (array with one advisory), approval_status='approved_with_advisory'. Completeness 5: all proposal clauses reviewed; IP and usage rights addressed (ip_rights_status='clear' with advisory flag about explicit ownership statement); project-type-specific compliance verified (HOA coordination clause and covenant review clause confirmed present in project_type_clauses). Accuracy 5: compliance issue correctly identified — IP ownership is implied by Mexican architectural services law but not explicit in proposal body; proposed resolution path given (add one sentence to proposal or rely on SOW esignature clause). Flag is correctly categorized as 'advisory' not 'blocking'. Clarity 5: approval_status='approved_with_advisory' is unambiguous — one advisory flag with specific resolution paths, no blocking issues. Notes explicitly state 'proceed to DG-05'. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: review conducted concurrently with Renata's proposal assembly (reviewed_at same session). Decision readiness 5: Vera can proceed to architect gate immediately — approval_with_advisory is non-blocking, flag is actionable. No auto-fail conditions triggered — IP section reviewed, no open unresolved blocking flags, full proposal reviewed per notes.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at legal-review — Celia fires at DG-05/DG-06 decision events.
